anti_patterns.title: Generic AI gradient replaces product-specific art direction
anti_patterns.do_not: Use a familiar blue-to-purple product hero gradient instead of letting the product's material, controls, or use context define the page.

anti_patterns.title: Urgency block marked as having no real condition
anti_patterns.do_not: Render urgency that has no verifiable stock, delivery, or date condition attached to it.

anti_patterns.title: Buy control marked as detached from decision context
anti_patterns.do_not: Place a purchase control where the selected variant, price, availability, and fulfillment facts are not available with it.

anti_patterns.title: Gallery marked as packshot-only evidence
anti_patterns.do_not: Limit the gallery to isolated pack shots when scale, material detail, or product-in-use evidence affects the purchase decision.

anti_patterns.title: Urgency color without a real condition
anti_patterns.do_not: Use warning red or countdown urgency unless it is tied to a verifiable stock, delivery, or date condition.

good_bad.good: Only 3 left — inventory is updated today.
good_bad.bad: HURRY! red styling with no stock, date, or delivery fact.

anti_patterns.title: Buy control lacks decision context
anti_patterns.do_not: Separate the purchase control from selected variant, price, availability, and fulfillment information.

anti_patterns.title: Gallery omits scale or material evidence
anti_patterns.do_not: Treat isolated pack shots as sufficient when size, material, detail, or product-in-use proof changes the decision.
